ddls:
CREATE TABLE "namespaces" (
  "namespace_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each namespace */,
  "namespace_name" TEXT /* Name of the namespace (e.g., BODY, CLUSTER, DBLINK, EDITION, HINTSET OBJECT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the namespace */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the namespace was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the namespace */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the namespace is active */,
  "namespace_type" TEXT /* Type of namespace (e.g., system, user-defined) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("namespace_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ges_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GES operation record */,
  "namespace_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the namespace */,
  "ges_lock_requests" INTEGER /* Number of GES lock requests */,
  "ges_pin_requests" INTEGER /* Number of GES pin requests */,
  "ges_pin_releases" INTEGER /* Number of GES pin releases */,
  "ges_inval_requests" INTEGER /* Number of GES invalidation requests */,
  "ges_invals" INTEGER /* Number of GES invalidations */,
  "operation_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the GES operation occurred */,
  "operation_status" TEXT /* Status of the GES operation (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the GES operation in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ges_operations_namespace_id FOREIGN KEY ("namespace_id") REFERENCES namespaces ("namespace_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_time_monitoring" (
  "monitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring record */,
  "namespace_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the namespace */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the monitoring data */,
  "ges_lock_requests" INTEGER /* Number of GES lock requests */,
  "ges_pin_requests" INTEGER /* Number of GES pin requests */,
  "ges_pin_releases" INTEGER /* Number of GES pin releases */,
  "ges_inval_requests" INTEGER /* Number of GES invalidation requests */,
  "ges_invals" INTEGER /* Number of GES invalidations */,
  "monitor_status" TEXT /* Status of the monitoring data (e.g., normal, warning, critical) */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database instance where the monitoring data was collected */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the source generating the monitoring data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_monitoring_namespace_id FOREIGN KEY ("namespace_id") REFERENCES namespaces ("namespace_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "namespace_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the namespace */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data */,
  "ges_lock_requests" INTEGER /* Number of GES lock requests */,
  "ges_pin_requests" INTEGER /* Number of GES pin requests */,
  "ges_pin_releases" INTEGER /* Number of GES pin releases */,
  "ges_inval_requests" INTEGER /* Number of GES invalidation requests */,
  "ges_invals" INTEGER /* Number of GES invalidations */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database instance where the historical data was collected */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the source generating the historical data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data (e.g., log, API, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_namespace_id FOREIGN KEY ("namespace_id") REFERENCES namespaces ("namespace_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "namespace_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the namespace */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., threshold exceeded, anomaly detected) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved, ignored) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high, critical) */,
  "alert_source" TEXT /* Source of the alert (e.g., threshold, anomaly detection) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_namespace_id FOREIGN KEY ("namespace_id") REFERENCES namespaces ("namespace_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, dba, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view, report) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
